steps.title: Spot the passage's movement
steps.content: After establishing that hybrid works exist, the passage introduces Bernardine Evaristo's The Emperor's Babe to exemplify one. The transition should signal “here's an example.”

steps.title: Apply the exemplification signal
steps.content: ”For example” directly marks this shift from a general principle to a specific illustration. The alternatives—”by contrast” (opposition), “consequently” (causation), and “secondly” (enumeration)—signal different relationships. That matches choice D — D is correct.
